tickets.title: US001: Head of Advising
tickets.description:
As a Head of Advising, I want to prevent Students from a asking 'Can I take Course B if I have not done Course A?' so that I can free about 6 hours.
Acceptance: 
1. Any similar question was prevenet?
2. Is student with special permission is allow?

tickets.title: US002: Student
tickets.description:
As a Student, i want to The course catalog is user-friendly, so that easily to use.
Acceptent criteria:
1. Is class can be dragged and dropped into canlendar?

analysis.ambiguity1: "The course catalog is urly" is not clear. We do not know how to improve? Like change color, size, ...?
analysis.ambiguity2: "The System needs to stop them from even asking" is ambiguity. How do we know which questions to stop?
analysis.conflictSolution:
Registrar: student cannot  add to their roadmap if class is full. 
However Advising Head want students are able to plan 4 years with know class is full yet.
=> "Cannot add class when full but add plan without check class" is conflict
=> Solution: Using mode/state machine: Devide into 2 modules, 1 for current quaters, 1 for planning.
analysis.nfr1: Security: Student data is sensitive. Under no circumstances should a student be able to see another student schedule.
analysis.nfr2: Perform: If a class is full, instantly the student should not be able to add it to their roadmap.
analysis.nfr3: Usability: Always availble when all students accept to register.
